EOF)

import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv\("data/market_fr.csv"\)
low = df[df['nb_sources'] < 5].sort_values\('nb_sources'\)
for _, r in low.iterrows\(\):
    print\(f"{r['nb_sources']:2d} | {r['brand']:12s} | {r['model']}"\)
EOF)

import sys, requests
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scrapers.tier2_sites import _headers_html

url = 'https://www.converse.com/fr/fr/search?query=Chuck+70+Low'
r = requests.get\(url, headers=_headers_html\(\), timeout=20, allow_redirects=True\)
print\('Status:', r.status_code, r.url\)
print\('Content snippet:', r.text[2000:3500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(timeout 30 venv/bin/python -c "
import requests, sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scrapers.tier2_sites import _headers_html, _extract_hits

tests = [
    \('https://www.baskets-hommes.fr/recherche?controller=search&s=reebok+nano+x4', 'Reebok', 'Nano X4', 'baskets-hommes.fr'\),
    \('https://www.zalando.fr/catalog/?q=reebok+nano+x4', 'Reebok', 'Nano X4', 'zalando.fr'\),
    \('https://www.jdsports.fr/search/reebok+nano+x4/', 'Reebok', 'Nano X4', 'jdsports.fr'\),
    \('https://www.spartoo.com/action/recherche?motcle=reebok+nano+x4', 'Reebok', 'Nano X4', 'spartoo.com'\),
    \('https://www.sportmaster.fr/search/?searchTerm=reebok+nano', 'Reebok', 'Nano X4', 'sportmaster.fr'\),
]
for url, brand, model, src in tests:
    try:
        r = requests.get\(url, headers=_headers_html\(\), timeout=12, allow_redirects=True\)
        hits = _extract_hits\(r.text, brand, model, src, url\)
        print\(f'{r.status_code} | {len\(hits\)} hits | {r.url[:70]}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'ERR {src}: {e!s:.70s}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scrapers.tier1_sites import TIER1_EXTRA_SCRAPER_CLASSES, TIER1_ECOM_EXTRA_SCRAPER_CLASSES
from scrapers.tier2_sites import TIER2_SCRAPER_CLASSES_REGISTERED

print\('=== TIER1 ECOM EXTRA ==='\)
for name, cls in TIER1_ECOM_EXTRA_SCRAPER_CLASSES:
    print\(f'  ✅ {name} \({cls.__name__}\)'\)

print\('\\n=== TIER2 REGISTERED ==='\)
for name, cls in TIER2_SCRAPER_CLASSES_REGISTERED:
    print\(f'  ✅ {name} \({cls.__name__}\)'\)

print\(f'\\nTotal scrapers dans le pipeline : {len\(TIER1_EXTRA_SCRAPER_CLASSES\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(timeout 60 venv/bin/python -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from scrapers.tier2_sites import VansFrScraper, SalomonFrScraper, ConverseFrScraper
from scrapers.tier1_sites import JdSportsScraper, ChausportScraper

tests = [
    \(VansFrScraper,    'Vans',    'Sk8-Hi Women'\),
    \(VansFrScraper,    'Vans',    'Sk8-Hi Reissue'\),
    \(SalomonFrScraper, 'Salomon', 'Speedcross 6 GTX'\),
    \(SalomonFrScraper, 'Salomon', 'XT-4 Advanced'\),
    \(SalomonFrScraper, 'Salomon', 'XT-6 Women'\),
    \(JdSportsScraper,  'Converse','Chuck 70 Low'\),
    \(JdSportsScraper,  'Reebok',  'Nano X4'\),
    \(ChausportScraper, 'Converse','One Star Women'\),
    \(ChausportScraper, 'Reebok',  'Instapump Fury Women'\),
]
for cls, brand, model in tests:
    s = cls\(\)
    hits = s.scrape_model\(brand, model\)
    prices = [h['price'] for h in hits]
    status = f'✅ {len\(hits\)} hits {prices[:4]}' if hits else '⚪ 0 hits'
    print\(f'  [{s.SOURCE_NAME}] {brand} {model:28s} → {status}'\)
" 2>&1)

    \(SalomonFrScraper, 'Salomon', 'Speedcross 6 GTX'\),

]

" 2>&1)
